user_system_path: enforce one active seam before landing work resumes
allowed_files_raw: Source-truth and command-gate files only: .foldera-contract.json, ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, scripts/source-truth-check.ts, scripts/continuity-gate.ts if necessary, tests/config/** if adding tests, .github/workflows/pr-sentinel.yml, and package.json only for an npm gate script.
forbidden_files_raw: No landing implementation, dashboard, backend, auth, Supabase, Stripe, Slack/Teams/email execution, scoring, conviction, broad cleanup, issue #99 work, package-lock changes unless absolutely necessary, new landing issue, or reopening PR #124/#125.
required_browser_proof: Not applicable: issue #123 is a repo governance command gate, not landing UI work. Protected Vercel preview links are not proof for this seam.
acceptance_condition: PR #130 enforces source-truth agreement across ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, and .foldera-contract.json, rejects paused landing work and closed PR reuse, and runs before the continuity gate in PR Sentinel.
stop_condition: Stop when PR #130 has exactly one purpose: source-truth command gate enforcement, with required proof posted. Do not resume issue #121 landing polish until this gate is green.
browser_proof_command: not applicable - source-truth command gate only
anti_regression_checks: issue #121 landing implementation is paused until #123 is enforced
protected Vercel preview links are not treated as proof text in controlling files
PR Sentinel runs the command gate before continuity gate
next_command: Run npm run gate:command, npm run gate:continuity, npm run lint, npm run build, post proof to PR #130, then stop.
